iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 06:00 — FALLING STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Hegseth claims Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei 'likely disfigured' from earlier strikes — leadership instability is a wildcard but doesn't directly map to nuclear escalation signals. Intense strikes on central Tehran reported (Al Jazeera live). Iran still channeling response through conventional means: Hormuz blockade, missile barrages, oil infrastructure threats. Nuclear track continues de-escalation despite conventional escalation. 14% (no change).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 06:04 — IMMINENT RISING. (1) New Israeli strike wave at 10pm local on central Tehran — residents report heavy explosions (NYT/Al Jazeera). (2) Kharg Island aftermath: Trump confirms 'obliterated every military target,' threatened oil infrastructure. (3) CNBC: Trump's plans to lower oil prices 'not working' — Hormuz near-closure disrupts 20M bbl/day. Oil above $100, spiked $120. (4) Iran parliament speaker warned 'new level of retaliation.' (5) 6 US service members killed in KC-135 crash (Iraq). 1,444 killed, 18,551 injured in Iran. 500+ missiles, ~2000 drones since Feb 28. Capped at 100.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 06:04 — IMMINENT RISING. (1) Axios: Israel agreed to spare Beirut airport but NOT other infrastructure. (2) IDF bombed bridge in south Lebanon — claimed Hezbollah using for troop/weapon movement. (3) Ground invasion planning continues: seize area south of Litani, 'largest since 2006.' 'We are going to do what we did in Gaza.' (4) 773+ killed including 100+ children. 800K-1M displaced. (5) 2 IDF soldiers killed, 14 wounded. (6) Hezbollah Radwan forces attempting raids on northern Israel. UNIFIL: 210+ rockets since March 2. Capped at 100.

turkey.notes: CRITICAL RISING. Third intercept confirmed March 13. NATO spokesperson Allison Hart: 'NATO remains vigilant and stands firm in its defence of all allies.' Sirens blared in Adana (Incirlik province). Turkey formally asked Tehran to clarify. Iran denies targeting, calls incidents 'possible false flag.' Politico EU: one more intercept likely triggers Article 4 consultations. 53 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 59. One intercept from IMMINENT.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. No new direct signals. Modi expressed 'deep concern,' spoke with Iranian President about Indian citizen safety. India condemns Pakistan strikes on Afghanistan, supports Afghan sovereignty — but this is diplomatic, not military escalation. UK FCDO advises against travel within 10km of India-Pakistan border. Pakistan-Afghanistan war now at IMMINENT (71) but no coupling rule FROM Pakistan to India. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL RISING. (1) ISW: Global oil price shock from Iran war has 'likely invalidated' assumptions about Russian economic downturn forcing Kremlin concessions — sanctions pressure weakened. (2) Russia condemns Ukrainian strike on Bryansk as 'terrorist attack,' accuses Britain of overstepping legal norms (Reuters). (3) Putin and Trump discussed both Iran and Ukraine wars — no breakthrough. (4) Russia 1,277,620 total casualties since 2022, 860 killed/wounded in last 24h. (5) Sweden boards suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker. 30 + 4 (Iran coupling) + 4 (Turkey coupling) = 38.

china.notes: DETERRENT RISING. (1) 5 PLA warplane flights near Taiwan detected, 3 crossed strait median line — resumption after 7-day lull. (2) US THAAD fully relocated from South Korea — all 6 launcher vehicles departed. Creates significant Asia defense gap. (3) NYT: 'How the War in Iran Could Help China' — US military overextension in ME creates strategic window. (4) $14B Taiwan arms deal still awaits Trump approval. China appears to be letting US overextend. 12 + 6 (THAAD) = 18.

north_korea.notes: ELEVATED RISING. DPRK fired suspected ballistic projectile Saturday morning (March 14) — Japan confirms fell into Sea of Japan. SECOND test this week. Days after Kim Jong Un oversaw cruise missile test from new Choe Hyon destroyer. KCNA condemns Japan Type-12 missile deployment to Kyushu. Kim + daughter gun practice photos published. US reportedly exploring talks. South Korea PM meets Trump — discusses Patriot redeployment to ME. 8 + 12 (missile test) + 2 (China coupling) = 22.

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL RISING. (1) Ceasefire by end of March at 2% on Polymarket — effectively dead. (2) ISW: Oil price shock invalidates assumptions about Russian economic pressure — war economy benefits from $100+ oil. (3) Russia condemns Bryansk strike as 'terrorist attack' using British missiles. (4) Ukrainian GUR strikes Russian radar stations and drone infrastructure. (5) France pledges continued support: 'Russia is mistaken, hoping for a respite.' 35 + 5 (Russia critical) + 5 (Turkey critical) = 45.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — MAJOR ESCALATION. (1) PAKISTAN DECLARES 'OPEN WAR': Defence Minister Khawaja Asif announced state of 'open war' with Afghanistan. Pakistan escalated airstrikes across Afghanistan including Kabul and Kandahar. (2) AFGHANISTAN HITS ISLAMABAD: Afghan drone struck 'Hamza' military center in Islamabad's Faizabad area — first strike on Pakistan's capital. Pakistan claims drones intercepted. (3) KOHAT FORT DESTROYED: Taliban claims destruction of Kohat military fortress and Durand Line command center. (4) CIVILIAN CASUALTIES: Pakistan airstrikes kill civilians in Kabul (4) and Kandahar (2), destroy Kam Air fuel depot. (5) Taliban retaliates with cross-border drone strikes. (6) Nuclear dimension: A nuclear-armed state in open war with neighbor striking near capital = extreme escalation risk. 10 + 10 + 8 + 7 + 5 + 15 = 55 + 16 (nuclear_escalation signal) = 71. IMMINENT.

Israel planning massive ground invasion to seize area south of Litani River — 'largest since 2006.' 773+ killed in Lebanon, 100+ children. 800K-1M displaced (Axios/Guardian)

Pakistan declares 'open war' with Afghanistan — Defence Minister Khawaja Asif. Strikes across Afghanistan including Kabul (Wikipedia/India Today)
US THAAD missile defense fully relocated from South Korea — all 6 launchers departed. Creates Asia defense gap (BBC/AP)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: ESCALATION — Day 15 06:00 SCAN — Global war probability 66% (IMMINENT). THREE TRACKERS NOW AT IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (100), Pakistan-Afghanistan (71). Pakistan-Afghanistan SURGES to IMMINENT with Afghanistan striking near Pakistan's capital — a nuclear-armed state in open war. This is the third active conflict zone reaching imminent status. Iran and Israel-Lebanon remain at maximum. Turkey critical (59) — one intercept from Article 4. Russia critical (38) — oil shock undermines sanctions. Russia-Ukraine critical (45) — ceasefire dead. DPRK elevated (22) — second missile test. Nuclear track still de-escalating at 14%. WATCH: (1) Pakistan-Afghanistan nuclear dimension — open war between nuclear state and neighbor striking capital. (2) Iran retaliation for Kharg + Tehran strikes. (3) Lebanon ground invasion deployment. (4) 4th Turkey intercept → Article 4. (5) DPRK follow-up. (6) Oil price spike from ME + Asia conflicts.

latest_news.headline: Israel agrees to spare Beirut airport but not other infrastructure — IDF bombs bridge in south Lebanon
latest_news.text: U.S. officials said Israel agreed to spare Beirut airport but stopped short of committing to protect other state infrastructure. IDF bombed a bridge in southern Lebanon it claimed Hezbollah was using to move forces and weapons. Ground invasion planning for south Lebanon continues.

latest_news.headline: Trump's plans to lower Iran-war oil prices aren't working — CNBC
latest_news.text: CNBC analysis: Trump administration's attempts to control oil price spikes from Iran war are failing. Hormuz near-closure disrupts 20M barrels/day. Price routing attempts and production increases elsewhere insufficient. Oil remains above $100, spiked to $120.

latest_news.headline: Afghanistan drone-strikes Pakistan's 'Hamza' military center in Islamabad
latest_news.text: Afghanistan's defense ministry said its air force carried out a drone strike on Pakistan's 'Hamza' military facility in Islamabad's Faizabad area — first strike on Pakistan's capital. Pakistan claims two drones intercepted. Taliban also claims destruction of Kohat military fortress and Durand Line command center.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan declares 'open war' with Afghanistan — airstrikes across country
latest_news.text: Pakistan Defence Minister Khawaja Asif announced state of 'open war' with Afghanistan. Pakistan escalated airstrikes striking targets throughout Afghanistan including Kabul and Kandahar. Civilians killed in Kabul (4) and Kandahar (2). Kam Air fuel depot at Kandahar airport destroyed.

latest_news.headline: Intense strikes target central Tehran — new wave at 10pm local
latest_news.text: Intense US-Israeli strikes targeting central Tehran. Israeli military launched new wave at approx 10pm local time. Residents reported heavy explosions. Escalation from periphery to capital heart. Combined with Kharg Island bombing and threats to oil infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: NATO intercepts third Iranian ballistic missile over Turkey — Adana sirens
latest_news.text: NATO air defenses intercepted third Iranian ballistic missile over Turkey in 10 days. Sirens blared in Adana province near Incirlik Air Base. NATO spokesperson: 'NATO remains vigilant.' Iran denies targeting, calls incidents 'possible false flag.' One more likely triggers Article 4.

latest_news.headline: 773+ killed in Lebanon, 100+ children. 800K-1M displaced
latest_news.source: The Guardian / Al Jazeera / Washington Post
latest_news.text: Lebanese Health Ministry: 773+ killed since March 2 including 100+ children. 1,933 injured. 800K-1M displaced by 25-mile evacuation order. Heart of Beirut struck. Bridge destroyed signaling long campaign.

latest_news.headline: ISW: Oil shock from Iran war invalidates Russian economic pressure assumptions
latest_news.text: Institute for the Study of War assesses: Global oil price shock from Iran war has 'likely invalidated' previous forecasts that compounding economic costs would force Kremlin concessions. Russia's war economy benefits from $100+ oil, undermining sanctions pressure.

latest_news.headline: DPRK fires suspected ballistic missile — second test this week
latest_news.text: North Korea fired a suspected ballistic projectile Saturday morning — Japan confirms projectile fell into Sea of Japan. Second test this week. Days after Kim Jong Un oversaw cruise missile test from new Choe Hyon destroyer.

outlook: CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 66% (up 3 from 63%). THREE TRACKERS AT IMMINENT (100, 100, 71): Iran conventional, Israel-Lebanon, and now Pakistan-Afghanistan. Pakistan-Afghanistan SURGES +35 points to 71 (IMMINENT) with Afghanistan striking near Pakistan's capital and Pakistan declaring 'open war' — first nuclear-armed state actively in open war with neighbor while under attack near capital. This is the third conflict zone reaching imminent status this cycle. Turkey at 59 (critical) — one more Iranian missile intercept from Article 4 and NATO involvement. Russia at 38 (critical) — oil shock undermining sanctions pressure, ceasefire dead. Russia-Ukraine at 45 (critical) — Polymarket at 2%. DPRK at 22 (elevated) — second missile test. Nuclear track still de-escalating at 14%. KEY RISKS NEXT 48H: (1) Pakistan-Afghanistan nuclear dimension — open war with strikes on nuclear state's capital. (2) Iran retaliation for Kharg + Tehran strikes — parliament speaker promised 'new level.' (3) Lebanon ground invasion deployment imminent. (4) 4th Turkey intercept triggers Article 4. (5) DPRK follow-up provocation. (6) Oil price super-spike from multi-zone conflicts. (7) US military overextension — air refueling fleet decimated, THAAD withdrawn from Asia. (8) Iran Supreme Leader health unclear — leadership instability wildcard.
